channel.title: Home on Blowfish
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Blowfish

item.title: Field Service Scheduler
item.description: Automated daily technician scheduling with constraints for route time, urgency, and skill coverage.

item.title: Manufacturing QA Dashboard
item.description: Merged inspection, scrap, and downtime data into one dashboard used in weekly quality reviews.

item.title: Inventory Sync Engine
item.description: Synced ERP and warehouse counts on a timed cadence with mismatch alerts for high-priority SKUs.

item.title: A 2.5-Day Loop in the San Juans
item.description: A short shoulder-season trip that reminded me how much good planning matters.

item.title: Sensor Calibration Pipeline
item.description: Standardized calibration data ingestion and report generation for faster compliance checks.

item.title: Procurement Quote Analyzer
item.description: Compared supplier quotes by lead time, risk flags, and landed cost using a repeatable scoring model.

item.title: Site Inspection Mobile Capture
item.description: Captured inspection notes and photos in the field with offline sync and standardized defect codes.

item.title: Maintenance KPI Alerts
item.description: Automated threshold alerts for downtime, MTTR, and repeat failures to trigger earlier interventions.

item.title: CAD to BOM Validator
item.description: Validated CAD assemblies against ERP bill-of-material exports to catch part and quantity mismatches.
